user_message: Just came out of territory planning with Parnell Aerospace. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Parnell Aerospace: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

required_artifacts: ECIF workscope draft with measurable deliverables

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF21-A trap (Asserts ECIF approved before submission); produces complete ECIF workscope draft with measurable deliverables, qualified partner, effort estimate, eligibility c
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF21-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF21-A failure mode (Asserts ECIF approved before submission)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF21-A -- Asserts ECIF approved before submission
